hero.bio1: Specialized in Java, Spring Boot and Android.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Sobre mí
about.p1: I am a software developer with experience building desktop applications, REST APIs and Android mobile apps.
about.p2: I have worked with teams on real projects, from database design to cloud deployment with Azure. I am passionate about writing clean code and building solutions that solve real problems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Proyectos
projects.jfocus_desc: Desktop task management application built with JavaFX.
projects.nanosip_desc: Enterprise management system with role-based access control. Handles employees, clients, sales, inventory and suppliers. REST API with Spring Boot and database deployed on Azure.
projects.nanosip_api_desc: REST API built with Spring Boot for the Nanosip project.
projects.atmos_desc: Android mobile app that consumes a weather API to display real-time weather conditions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Contacto
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to work together? Write to me.
